title: lotus gebelia subsp. libanoticus
intro: Lotus gebelia subsp. libanoticus, also known as the prickly lotus or red lotus, is a plant species from the family Haemodoraceae, native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function, as well as having potential applications in the treatment of various diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disorders. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
